title: Smoky Lamb Pasta Bake
description: A French-inspired pasta dish loaded with smoky lamb and a tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: pasta
ingredients.notes: Middle eastern style, such as pappardelle

ingredients.name: tangy sauce
ingredients.notes: Store-bought or homemade tomato sauce with a twist of lemon

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente. Drain and set aside.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add ground lamb and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Stir in smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add cooked pasta to the pan and stir to combine with lamb mixture.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a baking dish and top with tangy sauce and crumbled feta cheese (if using).
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, until thetop is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
